findings.evidence: `rg` shows `ComoduleCat.ofHom_id` and `ComoduleCat.ofHom_comp` in `TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/ComoduleCat.lean:140` and `:146`, while `Finite.lean` only defines `ofHom_hom`/`ofHom_apply` at lines 124 and 132.
findings.fix: Add `@[simp] theorem ofHom_id` and `@[simp] theorem ofHom_comp` in `FiniteComoduleCat`, paralleling `ComoduleCat.ofHom_id`/`ComoduleCat.ofHom_comp`.
findings.issue: `FiniteComoduleCat.ofHom` is public but only has projection/application lemmas; there are no `@[simp]` lemmas saying it sends `Comodule.Hom.id` to `𝟙` or `Comodule.Hom.comp` to categorical composition.

summary: The finite-comodule wrapper exposes `ofHom` but does not provide the identity/composition simp API needed to use it without unfolding the full-subcategory representation.
